title: linaria × sepium subsp. intermedia
intro: Linaria × sepium subsp. intermedia, commonly known as intermediate toadflax, is a plant species that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as alleviating respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Linaria × sepium subsp. intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
